name: OkamaOS
title: Update Safety, Storage, and Game Recovery
summary: Adds update apply confirmation, dev-mode update bundle selection, installed-system menu hiding, wallet RPC hex normalization, richer storage diagnostics, and crash-safe game launching.
notes: Updates now ask for confirmation before applying a downloaded OS bundle.
Dev mode lists detected .okupdate files with path, size, and modified time before apply.
Installed disk systems hide Install / Persistence unless developer mode is enabled.
Wallet RPC quantity parsing treats 0x, empty, and missing values as zero and skips unset OKToken contracts.
Storage Info ranks game, save, update, cache, log, wallet, controller, and download usage with largest files.
Game package downloads now use /var/okamaos/downloads while OS updates use /var/okamaos/updates/downloads.
okama-run now supervises games with startup timeout, emergency exit, crash logs, status JSON, and a recovery screen.
Plain pygame games are auto-presented to the framebuffer through /usr/lib/okamaos/game_bootstrap.py.
